about.title: About the Bahrain Football Association
about.subtitle: Learn about the governing body of football in the Kingdom of Bahrain

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To develop, promote, and govern football throughout the Kingdom of Bahrain, fostering excellence at all levels from grassroots to professional competitions.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To establish Bahrain as a leading football nation in the region, recognized for sporting excellence, fair play, and community engagement.

history.title: Our History
history.description: Founded in 1951, the Bahrain Football Association has been the governing body for football in Bahrain for over seven decades. We became a member of FIFA in 1966 and the Asian Football Confederation in 1970.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Stay up to date with the latest news from the Bahrain Football Association

matches.title: Matches
matches.subtitle: Follow all scheduled, live, and completed matches

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Access official regulations, guidelines, forms, and reports

sponsorship.title: Sponsor the Bahrain Football Association
sponsorship.subtitle: Partner with the official governing body of football in the Kingdom of Bahrain and connect your brand with millions of fans

why.title: Why Sponsor BFA?
why.description: Align your brand with Bahrain's most-followed sport and reach a passionate, engaged audience across the Kingdom and the wider region.

reach.label: Annual Audience
reach.desc: Fans reached across all matches, media, and digital platforms each season

brand.label: Competitions
brand.desc: National and club competitions offering year-round brand exposure

hospitality.label: Match Days
hospitality.desc: VIP hospitality opportunities to entertain clients at premier football events

impact.label: Community Impact
impact.desc: Demonstrate social responsibility through youth development and grassroots programs

packages.title: Sponsorship Packages
packages.subtitle: Choose the tier that best fits your brand objectives and budget
packages.customNote: All prices are indicative. Custom packages are available on request — contact us to discuss your specific needs.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Ready to partner with BFA? Fill in the enquiry form and our partnership team will get back to you within 2 business days.

membership.title: Join the BFA Family
membership.subtitle: Get exclusive access to matches, priority booking, and member benefits all year round
membership.compareSubtitle: Choose the membership that's right for you
membership.premiumTagline: All clubs, all matches, all season
membership.regularB1: Access to all home matches for your chosen club
membership.regularB5: Exclusive member discounts at your club's shop
membership.premiumB1: Unlimited access to ALL matches across ALL clubs
membership.premiumB2: Priority seating allocation at every venue
membership.premiumB3: Digital member card + physical premium welcome pack
membership.premiumB4: All club newsletters & exclusive BFA digital content
membership.premiumB6: Exclusive members' lounge access on match days
membership.premiumB7: Invitations to BFA events & annual gala dinner
membership.formSubtitle: Fill in your details below to complete your BFA membership registration

membership.name: Full Name

membership.successMessage: Your membership has been registered. A confirmation and your digital member card will be sent to your email.
